changes.behavioural_surface_area: Frontend copy rendering, frontend label mapping, narrative scrub rules, hero subline template. These changes affect user-visible clinical wording hierarchy and label presentation derived from Intelligence Core outputs. They do NOT touch signal activation, scoring, lab range handling, result versioning, parser behaviour, or analytical core.
regression_targets: PrimaryFindingAndWhy.tsx — hypothesis title scrubbed to neutral label when B12 counter-evidence present; counter-evidence bullets remain visible
ResultsBodyOverview.tsx — pattern-groups fallback copy when showPatternGroupBuckets=false and clusters.length>0
page.tsx / PipelineStatus.tsx — marker count labels distinguish 79 uploaded vs 9 key markers
retailNarrativeSanitize.ts — body_overview markdown stripped, 'Cardiovascular 4 Biomarkers' (title-case) scrubbed, 'analytical model' phrase substituted correctly after mojibake fix
resolveHeroPrimaryStory — subline wording explains homocysteine → vascular context relationship; no scoring change
ResultsHeroBlocks.tsx — driver band status label for 'critical' biomarkers uses consumer-safe label (Below range), not raw clinical status term
Baseline evidence preserved: result_versioning.compatible=true, clinician_report_v1 present, stale/incompatible banner absent
changes.scope_confirmed: Fixes confined to: frontend/app/lib/cardEvidenceConsumerCopy.ts, frontend/app/lib/retailNarrativeSanitize.ts, frontend/app/lib/resultsPageLayout.ts, frontend/app/components/results/ResultsBodyOverview.tsx, frontend/app/components/results/ResultsHeroBlocks.tsx, frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx (marker count labels), plus tests.

changes.citation: automation_bus/_uat_6bcbf1de_result_api.json: clinician_report_v1.sections.root_cause.hypotheses[0].title='B12-associated pattern', hypothesis_id='hcy_b12_pattern_v1'. report_compiler_v1.py:454 passes title through from insight_graph data unchanged. PrimaryFindingAndWhy.tsx:105: scrubConsumerRetailNarrative(hyp0.title). retailNarrativeSanitize.ts:92 scrubs slug hcy_b12_pattern_v1 but NOT the display title 'B12-associated pattern'. cardEvidenceConsumerCopy.ts:24-26 scrubs 'Homocysteine Elevation Context' but NOT 'B12-associated pattern'. Gap confirmed.
changes.fix_direction: Add scrub rule to cardEvidenceConsumerCopy.ts:scrubKnownInternalPatternNames — replace 'B12-associated pattern' with 'Raised homocysteine / one-carbon context' (or equivalent neutral label approved by prompt). Frontend scrub layer only. No compiler change required.
changes.stop_condition_check: CLEAR — title neutralisation is cautious display-layer copy; no new medical authority required; no signal/scoring change

changes.citation: frontend/app/components/results/ResultsBodyOverview.tsx:82-85 — hardcoded fallback 'Pattern groups are not available for this result yet' fires when showPatternGroupBuckets=false, regardless of clusters.length. API snapshot: clusters.length=3.
changes.fix_direction: Change else-branch copy at ResultsBodyOverview.tsx:82-85 — when hasBuckets=true and showPatternGroupBuckets=false, text must convey hidden/summary mode, not unavailability. Example: 'Pattern summaries are captured in your result narrative. Detailed breakdowns are available in technical detail.'
changes.stop_condition_check: CLEAR — pure copy change, no data change

changes.citation: automation_bus/_uat_6bcbf1de_result_api.json: biomarkers.length=79 (uploaded/scored panel); clinician_report_v1.data_quality.panel_completeness_present=9, panel_completeness_expected=9 (primary metric set for this interpretation). Toolbar renders biomarkers.length; PipelineStatus.tsx:57-61 renders primary metric completeness. No DTO change required — dual labels possible from existing fields.
changes.fix_direction: Frontend label clarification: toolbar 'X uploaded markers'; data quality section 'Y of Z key markers available for this headline interpretation'. No calculation change.
changes.stop_condition_check: CLEAR — no completeness calculation change; existing DTO fields sufficient

changes.citation: automation_bus/_uat_6bcbf1de_result_api.json narrative_report_v1.body_overview: contains '**Cardiovascular 4 Biomarkers**' (bold markdown, title-case) and 'analytical model \ufffd not to alter...' (\ufffd mojibake replaces em-dash). ResultsBodyOverview.tsx:44 pipes through scrubConsumerRetailNarrative(). stripSimpleMarkdownDecorators strips ** but leaves title-case 'Cardiovascular 4 Biomarkers'. EXACT_TOKEN_REPLACEMENTS (retailNarrativeSanitize.ts:33) only matches snake_case cardiovascular_4_biomarkers — MISS. scrubFeR6aRetailSurfacePhrases:76 regex requires [—–-] but \ufffd is still present when it runs (scrubMojibake runs AFTER at line 89) — MISS.
changes.fix_direction: Two required changes: (1) Add /\bCardiovascular\s+4\s+Biomarkers\b/gi mapping to EXACT_TOKEN_REPLACEMENTS in retailNarrativeSanitize.ts. (2) Either broaden scrubFeR6aRetailSurfacePhrases regex to match \ufffd as dash substitute (e.g. [—–\-\ufffd]) OR reorder scrubConsumerRetailNarrative pipeline to run scrubMojibakeArtifacts before scrubFeR6aRetailSurfacePhrases. Reordering is cleaner.
changes.stop_condition_check: CLEAR — presentation scrub only; no analytical meaning change; no markdown rendering (XSS risk absent)

changes.citation: frontend/app/lib/resultsPageLayout.ts:163 — systemContextLine: `Most relevant area: ${phenotypeLabel}`. phenotypeLabel = IDL records[0].retail_display_label = 'Vascular Inflammation Risk' (ph_vascular_hcy_inflammation_v1, severity_state: strong_signal confirmed from API snapshot). page1.primary_concern='Homocysteine Elevation Context...' → scrub → heroTitle='Raised homocysteine pattern...'
changes.fix_direction: Change systemContextLine template at resultsPageLayout.ts:163 from 'Most relevant area: ${phenotypeLabel}' to 'Relevant system context: ${phenotypeLabel}' or 'Raised homocysteine is the lead finding; the broader affected system is ${phenotypeLabel}.' Copy-only. No scoring, signal or domain ranking change.

changes.citation: automation_bus/_uat_6bcbf1de_result_api.json: transferrin.status='critical', value=2.0 g/L, reference_range {min:2.15, max:3.65, source:'lab'} — lab-grounded. frontend/app/lib/resultsPageLayout.ts:386-391 humanizeStatus() title-cases status string only → 'critical' → 'Critical'. ResultsHeroBlocks.tsx:161 calls humanizeStatus(b.status). trendComparison.ts:120 also imports and uses humanizeStatus.
changes.fix_direction: MUST NOT modify humanizeStatus() — it is used in trendComparison.ts:120 and changing it would silently alter trend view labels (unintended scope creep). MUST add a separate driverBandStatusLabel(status: string): string function in resultsPageLayout.ts that maps 'critical' → 'Below range' (and 'elevated' → 'Elevated', 'optimal' → 'Optimal', etc. as appropriate). Use driverBandStatusLabel() in ResultsHeroBlocks.tsx:161 instead of humanizeStatus(). Backend status remains 'critical' in DTO — only the display label changes.
changes.stop_condition_check: CLEAR — display label remapping only; no new medical severity inference; backend status unchanged; STOP condition 6 not triggered

changes.note: None of the following are required by any of the 6 fixes: signal library YAML, runtime context evaluator, signal evaluator, scoring core, result versioning compatibility logic, medical frame identity index, reference range logic, parser files. Prompt forbidden-file list fully respected.

changes.required: After implementation, re-verify: result_versioning.compatible=true, result_status=current, render_blockers=[], clinician_report_v1 present and populated, stale/incompatible banner absent, regenerate CTA absent for analysis_id 6bcbf1de-d97f-4a1c-9556-e3a6e0625fd1.

hardening_notes: Prompt is structurally sound. All 5 front matter fields valid. All 6 HIGH issues traced to specific files and lines from direct file reads and API snapshot cross-reference. Two mandatory implementation constraints issued: (1) IUAT-004: add title-case 'Cardiovascular 4 Biomarkers' scrub rule AND fix scrub pipeline ordering so mojibake runs before phrase substitution — both required or the 'analytical model' phrase fix will silently fail. (2) IUAT-006: must NOT modify humanizeStatus() due to trendComparison.ts dependency — must add a separate driverBandStatusLabel() function for the driver band only. No STOP conditions triggered. HIGH risk route applies: Claude audit + GPT architectural review + human approval before merge.
